instruction: Write a FreeMarker macro `renderSpecTable` that renders rows from `specs` (maps with `label`, `value`, and optional boolean `highlight`). Highlighted rows wrap the value in strong. Escape labels and values.
code:
<#-- Macro: renderSpecTable(specs) --> <#macro renderSpecTable specs> <#list specs![] as spec> class="highlight">
${spec.label?html} <#if spec.highlight!false> ${spec.value?html} <#else> ${spec.value?html}
